message:
test(conformance): extend fuzz_rolling_window corpus with 18 edge-case seeds

Add structured binary seeds for rolling window fuzz target:

Window size coverage (5 seeds):
- window_0_min_none: window=0
- window_1_min_1: window=1, min_periods=1
- window_len_min_none: window=series.len()
- window_len_plus1: window=len+1
- window_max: window=MAX

Min periods coverage (3 seeds):
- min_periods_0: min_periods=0
- min_periods_window: min_periods=window
- min_periods_exceeded: min_periods > window

Series content coverage (10 seeds):
- all_nulls, no_nulls, alternating_nulls: null handling
- single_value: constant values
- increasing, decreasing: monotonic sequences
- large_series: 32-element stress test
- negative_values, zeros, mixed_signs: numeric edge cases

Seeds stored in fuzz/corpus/ and fixtures/adversarial/. All 21
rolling_window fixture tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
